profile: Otherworld UR Power Support / Debuff-Immune healer. Her skill and Ultimate heal allies for %ATK and apply [Dark Plume]/[Feather Blessing], cleanse debuffs, block incoming debuffs, and reduce ally DoT by 30% while she lives. She wants Heal amplification, ATK (her heals scale off it), Effect Resist, team shields, and personal survivability — she does zero personal DPS, no crit, no basic attacks, no bleed/infect, so all offensive mirrors are dead weight.

ranking.name: Theresa
ranking.reason: Pure heal amp (+15% Heal at 5*) directly multiplies her core %ATK heals on skill and Ultimate; perfect for a dedicated healer. BiS support stat-stick.

ranking.name: Elbera‘s Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Her own themed mirror: +Effect Resist plus stacking Effect Resist and self-heal each time a buff expires; feeds her Debuff-Immune identity and keeps her alive to hold the 30% DoT reduction aura.

ranking.name: Mystic Bull
ranking.reason: Battle-start team-wide Shield scaling off her huge Max HP, stackable; adds a survivability layer her heal-only kit lacks and protects the whole team she buffs.

ranking.name: Mister
ranking.reason: All her healing and [Dark Plume] application scale off ATK; flat ATK% is one of the few stats that raise her actual output. Cheap, universal, always-on.

ranking.name: Warding Blessing
ranking.reason: On-death [Spirit Shield] to lowest-HP (and highest-ATK at 5*) ally that blocks DMG instances uncannot-dispel; team insurance if she falls. A->stronger at 3*+ (extra blocks/targets).

ranking.name: Dracula
ranking.reason: +HP and stacking Healing Received as HP drops; raises her bulk (she must survive to hold the DoT aura) and self-sustain. Strong defensive keeper for a support.

ranking.name: Frostglow
ranking.reason: Flat +30% Final DMG RED at 5*: pure survivability so she stays alive to maintain heals and the 30% ally DoT-reduction aura. Highest unconditional DR available.

ranking.name: Eternal Stand
ranking.reason: Stacking Final DMG RED per hit received (up to 45%); she is a focus-fire target as a healer, so this ramps her survivability fast and keeps the aura up.

ranking.name: Albert
ranking.reason: +15% HP raises her bulk and the basis of Mystic Bull-style HP-scaled shields; keeps her alive to keep healing. Reliable defensive stat for a support.

ranking.name: Rock Elephant
ranking.reason: Caps burst spikes (reduces excess of big hits); protects a squishy support from assassination so her heals and DoT aura persist.

ranking.name: Flame Dawn
ranking.reason: Self-revive on first death restoring large HP + turn-end regen; a fallen healer is catastrophic, so the auto-rez keeps her team-sustain online.

ranking.name: Titan Strength
ranking.reason: When carrying any Shield, +ATK/DEF and (5*) turn-end lost-HP recovery; ATK portion helps her heals and pairs with Mystic Bull/Warding shields, but conditional. B->better at 3*+.

ranking.name: Alluring Gaze
ranking.reason: Big Effect Resist at turn start (removed on action); supports her anti-debuff theme but the on-action removal blunts it on a hero who acts to heal every turn.

ranking.name: Raphael
ranking.reason: Flat Effect Resist Rate reinforces her Debuff-Immune identity and protects her buffs/heals from cleansing; modest but on-theme.

ranking.name: Orpheus
ranking.reason: Turn-start self-recovery of lost HP; passive self-sustain keeps a focus-fired support topped off, but does nothing for the team.

ranking.name: Galos
ranking.reason: +DEF% is generic survivability; useful filler to keep a squishy support alive, though DEF scales her output none.

ranking.name: Frankenstein
ranking.reason: +HP% bulk filler (weaker than Albert at the same role); helps her survive to keep healing.

ranking.name: Zhiming
ranking.reason: Flat Final DMG RED filler; smaller than Frostglow/Garvin but still pure survivability she can use.

ranking.name: Garvin
ranking.reason: Flat Final DMG RED, smaller per-tier than Frostglow but same survivability role; solid defensive bench.

ranking.name: Jacob
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED that scales as HP drops; the DR half is useful survivability for her, the Final DMG half is wasted (she does no damage).

ranking.name: Gaia Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: +HP and lethal-hit retaliation; the HP raises her bulk, the True-DMG payload is wasted on a non-DPS. Useful only for the HP, hence bench.

ranking.name: Dark Tide
ranking.reason: +HP is useful but the conditional DMG-when-higher-HP clause is dead on a healer who deals no damage; you only get half the mirror.

ranking.name: Venus
ranking.reason: Support-type DMG reduction utility, but its DR is conditional/team-niche and weaker than the flat DR options she already has.

ranking.name: Lincoln
ranking.reason: Crit DMG RED is narrow defensive value (only vs crit comps); minor survivability with no synergy to her kit.

ranking.name: Heidi
ranking.reason: Single-target heal amp helps her skill's single-target heals, but it ignores her all-ally Ultimate heal; Theresa's flat heal amp is strictly better for her.

ranking.name: Elegy
ranking.reason: Anti-heal-on-crit is offense utility; she never crits and deals no damage, so it almost never triggers. Dead clause, tiny stat.

ranking.name: Jeanne
ranking.reason: Strong tank/support DR+heal mirror, but its big payoffs key off Damage-Share Status she doesn't have; only the small flat DR applies to her.

ranking.name: Aurora
ranking.reason: DEF Ignore is a pure offensive stat; she deals no meaningful damage, so it is wasted.

ranking.name: Yin
ranking.reason: Final DMG% is pure offense; her output is heals (which don't scale off Final DMG), so it does nothing for her.

ranking.name: Firmament
ranking.reason: Final DMG% offense stat with no relevance to a heal/buff support.

ranking.name: Throat-Slitting
ranking.reason: Final DMG% offense; wasted on a non-DPS support.

ranking.name: Michael
ranking.reason: Final DMG% offense; no synergy with a healer's kit.

ranking.name: Ananke Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Final DMG + True DMG offense package; she deals neither, so it's dead.

ranking.name: Vivi
ranking.reason: Crit Rate; she has no crit-scaling damage, so it does nothing.

ranking.name: Aelia
ranking.reason: Crit DMG; non-crit, non-DPS support gains nothing.

ranking.name: Daisy
ranking.reason: Final DMG + Crit offense; both levers are irrelevant to her heals.

ranking.name: Hinata Inori
ranking.reason: Final DMG + Crit offense; no synergy with a support.

ranking.name: Tinplate
ranking.reason: Counter True-DMG off DEF is a tank-retaliation effect; her DEF is tiny and she isn't built to be hit-and-reflect.

ranking.name: Kira
ranking.reason: Single-target ATK DMG boost is pure DPS; she deals no attack damage.

ranking.name: Valendine
ranking.reason: Execute-style single-attack DMG amp; she has no damaging single attacks.

ranking.name: Ada
ranking.reason: ATK DMG vs debuffed enemies is offense; she debuffs nothing and deals no damage.

ranking.name: Adele
ranking.reason: Crit + basic-attack DPS package; she neither crits nor basic-attacks for damage.

ranking.name: Alucard
ranking.reason: Crit stat + on-crit buff-dispel; she never crits, so neither clause ever fires.

ranking.name: Wukong
ranking.reason: True DMG offense; no damage in her kit to scale.

ranking.name: Night Depths
ranking.reason: True DMG offense; dead on a pure healer.

ranking.name: Nyx Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: AOE True DMG offense; she deals no area damage.

ranking.name: Luna
ranking.reason: AOE DMG boost; her only all-ally action is a heal, not AOE damage.

ranking.name: Royal Awe
ranking.reason: Generic DPS power package with no clause that touches healing or survivability for her.

ranking.name: Isabella
ranking.reason: Final DMG + shield-on-damage; the shield clause keys off dealing damage she doesn't do, so it rarely procs.

ranking.name: Uncle Ying
ranking.reason: Ultimate DMG boost; her Ultimate is a heal, not damage, so this is inert.

ranking.name: Van Helsing
ranking.reason: Ultimate-DMG + basic-attack ramp; her Ultimate deals no damage and she doesn't basic-attack, so both clauses (incl. the 3* unlock) are dead.

ranking.name: Rose
ranking.reason: Stacking Final DMG per attack (more on Ultimate/Feat); raises damage she doesn't deal. The 3* split clause is still pure offense, wasted on her.

ranking.name: Renais
ranking.reason: Basic-attack DMG ramp + on-kill basic attack; she rarely basic-attacks and doesn't secure kills, so even the 3* on-kill clause won't fire.

ranking.name: Scale-Splitting
ranking.reason: Basic-attack True DMG (more on crit at 3*+); she neither basic-attacks for damage nor crits, so it's dead.

ranking.name: Wasteward
ranking.reason: Final DMG + basic-attack offense; no basic-attack damage in her kit.

ranking.name: Horde-Assault
ranking.reason: AOE/single True DMG offense bundle; she deals no damage of any kind.

ranking.name: Lucifer
ranking.reason: DoT-target execute True DMG + Torment; she applies no DoT and deals no damage, so even the 3* unlock can't proc.

ranking.name: Mars Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Feat-crit True DMG + Spirit Armor on crit; she doesn't crit, so the trigger never lands (incl. the 3* Spirit Armor clause).

ranking.name: Ling
ranking.reason: Infect + True DMG offense; she applies no infect and deals no damage.

ranking.name: Lilith
ranking.reason: Per-debuff True DMG on single skill attack (Infect bonus at 5*); she applies no debuffs to enemies and deals no damage.

ranking.name: Sherry
ranking.reason: Bleed control offense; she applies no bleed and the effect is enemy-facing.

ranking.name: Ying Gou
ranking.reason: Infect application on a support who never applies infect; dead.

ranking.name: Sariel
ranking.reason: On-being-attacked chance to Infect attacker; tiny chance, enemy-debuff utility unrelated to her heal/buff role.

ranking.name: Azmodan
ranking.reason: Bleed application; she applies no bleed and deals no damage to leverage it.

ranking.name: Bathory
ranking.reason: Effect Hit Rate boosts landing debuffs on enemies; she lands no offensive debuffs, so it's wasted.

ranking.name: Arthur
ranking.reason: ATK DMG vs controlled enemies is offense; she neither controls nor deals damage.

ranking.name: Enchantress
ranking.reason: Control + True DMG + Effect Hit offense bundle; none of these levers exist in her supportive kit.

ranking.name: Nuwa Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Final DMG + control + Effect Hit offense; entirely offense-facing, nothing for a healer.

ranking.name: Baleful Omen
ranking.reason: Final DMG + [Lethal] application on dealing damage; she deals no damage so it never procs, and Final DMG is wasted. Fully dead for her.
